title: phleum pratense subsp. abbreviatum
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. abbreviatum, commonly known as the meadow grass or short meadow grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. abbreviatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
